selected_candidate_preserved.reason: The decision input identifies the Runtime-locked Candidate.

canonical_implementation_present.reason: The Stage includes the approved tree, element mapping, class intent, and explicit project intent decisions.

approved_build_tree_preserved.claim: The prior approved Build Tree is embedded.
approved_build_tree_preserved.reason: Runtime can digest and compare the embedded structure against the prior Build Tree.

asset_intent.reason: The approved implementation uses editable text and an inline SVG widget; no external project asset is required.

scoped_css_intent.reason: The implementation is expressible through the selected native elements and class application map.

dynamic_loop_intent.reason: The approved structure contains no repeated data-driven content.

responsive_risk_seeds.description: The connector decoration must be validated across downstream responsive breakpoints.

media_decision.selected_option: editable text with inline SVG decoration

styling_decision.selected_option: native controls with explicit class application and no custom CSS
